name: Dagger
summary: −1 damage. First dagger does not take an item slot.
description: A knife or other small weapon such as a light club. Daggers have a −1 damage modifier. The first dagger carried by a figure does not take up an item slot.

name: Hand Weapon
summary: No combat modifiers. One item slot.
description: Swords, scimitars, hand axes, maces, light spears, etc. No modifiers in combat.

name: Two-Handed Weapon
description: Two-handed swords, battle-axes, polearms, large flails, heavy spears. +2 damage. Takes two item slots.

name: Staff
description: Staffs do −1 damage and give the opponent −1 damage in hand-to-hand. Cannot be combined with a shield.

name: Bow
summary: Range 24". Load and fire as one action. Needs a quiver.
description: Load and fire as a single action. Maximum range 24". Requires a quiver.

name: Crossbow
summary: +2 damage, range 24". Separate load and fire. Needs a quiver.
description: One action to load and one to fire. +2 damage, range 24". Requires a quiver.

name: Quiver
summary: Required for bow/crossbow. One free magic ammo slot.
description: Required to shoot a bow or crossbow. May carry one magic ammunition without an extra slot.

name: Shield
summary: +1 Armour. Not with two-handed weapon or staff. No spellcasters.
description: +1 Armour. Cannot be carried with a two-handed weapon or staff. Spellcasters may not carry shields.

name: Light Armour
description: +1 Armour. Spellcasters may not wear light armour.

name: Heavy Armour
description: +2 Armour but −1 Move. Spellcasters may not wear heavy armour.

name: Potion
summary: Pick a specific potion in the second field.
description: Potions take one item slot. Choose the specific potion type after selecting this.

name: Scroll
summary: Pick which spell is on the scroll in the second field.
description: One-use spell scroll. Cannot be used to learn a new spell. Sale value typically 30gc.

name: Grimoire
summary: Pick which spell the grimoire teaches in the second field.
description: Used to learn a new spell. After learning, remove from the sheet. Sale 200gc if already known.
